free_text: The (He3,p) reaction induced by polarized He-3 on
two detector telescopes were used, whereas for the
33 MeV Be-9 and Li-7 measurements it was necessary to
use triple detector telescopes to detect the energetic
protons from the (He3,p) reaction simultaneously with
No information about source of uncertainties

added. ERR-ANALYS, EN-SEC deleted. STATUS updated.

yields with a previous experiment (see REL-REF).
